'''hanozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coabuser|coabuser]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-n-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coabuser|coabuser]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hanozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hænezeth|hænezeth]] || [[word:hænezej|hænezej]] || [[word:hænezesh|hænezesh]] || [[word:hæneze|hæneze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hanonozoth|hanonozoth]] || [[word:hanonozoj|hanonozoj]] || [[word:hanonozosh|hanonozosh]] || [[word:hanonozo|hanonozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hanozoth|hanozoth]] || [[word:hanozoj|hanozoj]] || [[word:hanozosh|hanozosh]] || [[word:hanozo|hanozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hanofzoth|hanofzoth]] || [[word:hanofzoj|hanofzoj]] || [[word:hanofzosh|hanofzosh]] || [[word:hanofzof|hanofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hanozotho|hanozotho]] || [[word:hanozojo|hanozojo]] || [[word:hanozosho|hanozosho]] || [[word:hanozoko|hanozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hanozoth|hanozoth]] || [[word:hanozoj|hanozoj]] || [[word:hanozosh|hanozosh]] || [[word:hanozo|hanozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hanozothol|hanozothol]] || [[word:hanozojol|hanozojol]] || [[word:hanozoshol|hanozoshol]] || [[word:hanozokol|hanozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hanozothotho|hanozothotho]] || [[word:hanozojojo|hanozojojo]] || [[word:hanozoshosho|hanozoshosho]] || [[word:hanozoko|hanozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hanozothon|hanozothon]] || [[word:hanozojon|hanozojon]] || [[word:hanozoshon|hanozoshon]] || [[word:hanozokon|hanozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hanozothoro|hanozothoro]] || [[word:hanozojoro|hanozojoro]] || [[word:hanozoshoro|hanozoshoro]] || [[word:hanozokoro|hanozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
